name: Meat Loaf Cordon Bleu
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch green onions (include green tops), chopped
2 ounces Prosciutto or other smoked ham, chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
3. Add 2 tablespoons parsley, bread crumbs, chicken broth, garlic, salt, tarragon, mustard, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Mix in ground beef. Set aside.
5. Saute onions in butter until soft.
6. Blend cheese, ham, remaining parsley, and onions in a medium bowl.
7. Divide the meat mixture into two equal parts.
8. Pat one part into the stoneware loaf pan to form a layer.
9. Top with cheese mixture.
10. Pat remaining meat mixture on top of cheese.
11. Bake for 45 minutes.
12. Remove stoneware loaf pan from oven and drain off fat.
13. Bake an additional 30 minutes.
14. Cool for 15 minutes in the stoneware loaf pan, then remove from pan and cool completely in refrigerator.
15. Cut into thin slices for sandwiches. May also be served hot.
Yield: 1 loaf
